Title: GAJ-CREDIT-DAILY-001 - First eligible sign-in grants 10 credits
Preconditions: User account exists. User has not received the daily login bonus for the selected bonus date.
Steps:
1. Sign in as an eligible user.
2. Allow the daily bonus award logic to run.
3. Review the user credit balance and ledger entries.
Expected Result: User receives exactly +10 credits and one daily_login_bonus ledger entry is created.
Notes: Core happy path for daily bonus behavior.

Title: GAJ-CREDIT-DAILY-002 - Repeated same-day sign-in does not grant duplicate bonus
Preconditions: User has already received a daily_login_bonus entry for the selected bonus date.
Steps:
1. Sign out if needed.
2. Sign in again as the same user on the same bonus date.
3. Review the user credit balance and ledger entries.
Expected Result: No second +10 daily_login_bonus entry is created for the same user/date.

Title: GAJ-CREDIT-DAILY-003 - Daily bonus ledger entry uses correct reason and ref
Preconditions: Eligible user can receive daily login bonus.
Steps:
1. Trigger daily bonus award.
2. Inspect the resulting ledger entry.
3. Verify ledger reason and ref format.
Expected Result: Ledger entry uses delta +10, reason daily_login_bonus, and a unique ref for user/date.
Notes: Can be checked in fixture-level automation before DB integration exists.

Title: GAJ-CREDIT-DAILY-004 - Daily bonus is isolated per user
Preconditions: Two different users exist and neither has received the daily bonus for the selected date.
Steps:
1. Sign in as User A and trigger daily bonus.
2. Sign in as User B and trigger daily bonus.
3. Review both users credit ledgers.
Expected Result: Each user can receive their own +10 bonus. User A actions do not affect User B balance.

Title: GAJ-CREDIT-DAILY-005 - Near-midnight sign-in does not double-award incorrectly
Preconditions: Test environment can control or simulate bonus dates/timestamps.
Steps:
1. Trigger sign-in near the daily cutoff boundary.
2. Trigger another sign-in around the boundary.
3. Review ledger entries by bonus date.
Expected Result: Bonus is awarded according to the intended date rule and does not duplicate unexpectedly.

Title: GAJ-CREDIT-DAILY-006 - Concurrent sign-ins do not create duplicate bonus entries
Preconditions: Eligible user exists. Test can simulate rapid or concurrent login requests.
Steps:
1. Trigger two sign-in/bonus attempts for the same user/date close together.
2. Review resulting ledger entries.
3. Review final credit balance.
Expected Result: Only one +10 daily_login_bonus entry exists for the same user/date.

Title: GAJ-CREDIT-DAILY-007 - Bonus credits are not treated as paid or donatable credits
Preconditions: User has only daily_login_bonus credits and no purchased credits.
Steps:
1. Award daily login bonus.
2. Attempt a paid-credit-only action such as donation if applicable.
3. Review eligibility calculation.
Expected Result: Daily bonus credits are treated as free credits and do not count as paid/donatable credits.
Notes: Important because donation logic distinguishes paid credits from free credits.

Title: GAJ-CREDIT-DAILY-008 - UI credit count updates after daily bonus award
Preconditions: Eligible user exists and can sign in through the UI.
Steps:
1. Sign in as an eligible user.
2. Observe the header/account credit count.
3. Refresh or navigate if needed.
Expected Result: Displayed credit count reflects the +10 daily bonus after the award is granted.
Notes: UI/E2E check after auth test harness exists.
